name: Low-Fat Alfredo Sauce
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces fettuccine or linguine (cooked and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine cottage cheese and milk; blend until smooth.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, cook sweet pepper and garlic in hot margarine over medium heat until tender.
3. Reduce heat to low. Add the milk mixture, peas, salt, and pepper. Stir well.
4. Cook and stir until heated through (do not boil). Toss with hot pasta.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and fresh basil. Serve.
Nutrition facts per serving: 362 calories, 5g total fat (1g saturated fat), 13mg cholesterol, 338 mg sodium, 52g carbohydrates, 1 gram fiber, and 26 grams protein. Daily value: 18% vitamin A, 37% vitamin C, 8% calcium, and 18% iron.
